title: dicliptera scabra
intro: Dicliptera scabra, also known as the rough forked tongue plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Dicliptera scabra is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including wounds and respiratory problems.
